projects.title: fakeNET
projects.subtitle: Forensic Explainability of Deepfake Detection
projects.description: Lightweight explainable deepfake detection and localization, 2.13M parameters, 96.79% accuracy, outperforming 13B-parameter models.
projects.problem: Deepfake detectors are either accurate-but-opaque or interpretable-but-weak. Forensic use requires both properties simultaneously.
projects.approach: Designed a compact attention-based model for deepfake detection and pixel-level localization with explainable spatial outputs, prioritizing forensic usability over scale.
highlights: 2.13M parameter model, compact and deployable
Attention-based architecture with spatial localization outputs
Evaluated against state-of-the-art detectors on AIGI-Now benchmarks
impact: 96.79% accuracy and 96.78% F1 score
Outperformed SIDA (93.6% accuracy, 13B parameters)
Ranked 2nd on AIGI-Now benchmarks with 84.53% pixel-balanced accuracy
learnings: Designing compact models that compete with much larger ones
Evaluation on real-world AI-generated image detection benchmarks
Balancing model explainability with detection performance

projects.title: Aayojan
projects.subtitle: Wedding CRM & Operations Platform
projects.description: Production-ready wedding CRM with 40+ REST APIs, role-based access across 4 user types, and AI-powered assistance, deployed and live.
projects.problem: Wedding planners manage vendors, budgets, timelines, and client communication across disconnected tools, leading to missed deadlines and communication gaps.
projects.approach: Built a MERN CRM with JWT authentication, drag-and-drop Kanban workflows, and AI-powered assistance. 40+ REST APIs cover lead management, vendor coordination, budget tracking, document storage, and automated scheduling.
highlights: 40+ REST APIs with role-based access across 4 user roles
Drag-and-drop Kanban workflow management
Automated email and SMS reminders with scheduled background jobs
AI-powered assistant for workflow suggestions and queries
impact: Deployed and live at wed-aayojan.vercel.app
End-to-end event operations managed in one platform
JWT-secured multi-role system with real-time collaboration
learnings: Designing role-based access control at API scale
Reliable scheduling of background jobs in Node.js
Integrating AI assistance within a workflow-heavy application

projects.title: Multi-Agent Swarm System
projects.subtitle: Warehouse Automation with ROS2
projects.description: ROS2 swarm of three robots for warehouse exploration, object pickup, and color sorting, trained with PPO over 100K+ steps across parallel environments.
projects.problem: Warehouse tasks need coordinated multi-robot behavior with reliable perception and navigation under sensor noise.
projects.approach: Implemented ROS2 Humble with Gazebo simulation, trained a PPO navigation policy in Stable-Baselines3, and fused LiDAR with RGB-D vision for multi-robot coordination.
highlights: Distributed exploration and object pickup across 3 robots
PPO policy trained over 100K+ steps across 4 parallel environments
LiDAR + RGB-D perception stack for color sorting and navigation
impact: 3 robots operated autonomously in a 10m × 8m warehouse simulation
1st place in RL Track and 3rd overall at HCLTech DL Hackathon'26 (50+ teams)
learnings: Reward shaping for collaborative multi-agent exploration
Observation design for stability in multi-agent RL
Managing sensor noise and sim-to-real considerations

projects.title: Nostalgic Fever
projects.subtitle: Time-Locked Memory Capsule Platform
projects.description: Time-locked memory capsules with real-time WebSocket chat, ML sentiment analysis, and blockchain-backed image verification.
projects.problem: Digital memories feel disposable and easy to alter, people can't trust them to hold meaning over time.
projects.approach: Built a MERN platform with scheduled unlocks, WebSocket real-time chat, HuggingFace sentiment analysis, and Solidity hash registry on Ethereum Sepolia for tamper evidence.
highlights: Time-locked capsule creation with scheduled release
Real-time messaging and reactions during capsule unlocks
Blockchain-backed image verification via Ethereum Sepolia smart contracts
impact: Tested with 100+ users during the hackathon demo
Sentiment classifier reached ~85% accuracy on validation data
Won 1st place at KrackHack'25 (100+ teams)
learnings: Balancing model latency with live chat UX requirements
Time-based access control and background job scheduling
Simple on-chain hashing patterns for integrity verification

projects.title: Xpensa
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Personal Finance Tracker
projects.description: RAG-based expense querying and financial document parsing with sub-second retrieval across statements and invoices.
projects.problem: Expense analysis across bank statements and invoices is slow, error-prone, and requires manual categorization.
projects.approach: Built a RAG pipeline over parsed financial documents using Pathway, LangChain, and FastAPI, with an agent layer for reasoning and a MERN front-end.
highlights: Automated parsing for statements and invoices
RAG search with natural language queries
Agent-based insights for recurring expense patterns
impact: Reduced financial document lookup time from minutes to under 1 second
Top 5 finalist at FrostHack'25
Handled real-world documents without additional fine-tuning
learnings: Indexing strategies for noisy and varied PDF formats
Latency tradeoffs in multi-step retrieval pipelines
Guardrails for sensitive financial data in LLM contexts

projects.title: TheQuro
projects.subtitle: RAG-Driven Study Partner
projects.description: Multi-modal study assistant for PDFs and images with fast OCR ingestion and contextual Q&A over personal notes.
projects.problem: Students need quick, grounded answers across scattered notes, slides, and lecture documents.
projects.approach: Built OCR ingestion for PDFs and images, embeddings for retrieval, and a RAG pipeline using Gemini 1.5 Flash, LangChain, and FastAPI.
highlights: Multi-modal ingestion with OCR for PDFs and images
Context-aware Q&A over personal document collections
Fast processing pipeline for long documents
impact: Processed 200-page documents in under 3 minutes
Improved answer relevance versus a baseline GPT setup
Showcased at Engineering Day'25
learnings: Chunking and retrieval tuning strategies for long documents
Evaluation with small-scale user studies
Prompting techniques for grounded, citation-aware answers

projects.title: Devgatha
projects.subtitle: AI Coding Tutor Platform
projects.description: Live coding tutor with real-time AI suggestions, automated code reviews, and tutor-student session management.
projects.problem: Beginners need immediate, contextual feedback beyond static lessons, but live tutors are expensive and unavailable on demand.
projects.approach: Built a MERN platform with Socket.io for live sessions and AI services for code suggestions, automated reviews, and debugging guidance.
highlights: Real-time AI code suggestions via WebSocket
Automated code review and debugging guidance
Structured live tutor-student session management
impact: Delivered structured feedback loops for beginner learners
Live at devgatha.onrender.com
learnings: Feedback UX design for beginners vs. experienced learners
Session reliability and rate limiting in real-time systems
Human-in-the-loop tutoring interaction design

projects.title: Line Maze Solver
projects.subtitle: Autonomous Robot Navigation
projects.description: Custom line maze robot with PID motor control and sensor-driven path logic, qualified for IIT Bombay TechFest'24 finals.
projects.problem: Fast maze navigation requires stable motor control under sensor noise and reliable handling of intersections.
projects.approach: Designed a custom PCB for compact sensor integration, tuned PID control loops, and built path logic for tight turns and complex intersections.
highlights: Custom PCB design for compact IR sensor integration
PID-tuned motor control for speed and stability
Path planning logic for complex line maze configurations
impact: Qualified for IIT Bombay TechFest'24 finals
Reliable competitive-speed navigation in live conditions
learnings: Hardware-software co-design tradeoffs
Calibration and noise filtering for IR sensors
Control stability under varying speed constraints
